profile_required.client_behavior: Ask the user to select or configure a profile, or retry after pairing/profile setup.

profile_not_found.client_behavior: Clear stale explicit profile selection and request fresh profile state.

device_not_mapped.message: Device is not mapped to a profile: djconnect-ios-ABCDEF123456
device_not_mapped.client_behavior: Keep pairing but ask user/admin to map the device to a profile.

backend_not_configured.message: Profile has no configured music backend: profile-peter

music_account_not_configured.message: Profile music account is missing: account-peter

invalid_client_type.client_behavior: Stop the request and update the client identity contract.

invalid_request_context.client_behavior: Correct malformed request fields before retrying.

profile_access_denied.message: This client cannot access the requested profile.
profile_access_denied.client_behavior: Do not retry automatically; request explicit user action.

private_session_restriction.message: This action is not available during a private session.
private_session_restriction.client_behavior: Hide persistence-only actions while private session is active.
